## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature at a high level.

## Why It Matters

Explain how this improves SkillGuard for users, contributors, or integrations.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you considered.
